comments.author: @RealLifeFilesDoc
comments.text: Hola! Watching this at 9:28 PM on a Wednesday from Vietnam 🇻🇳. As a documentary video editor, I am so impressed by the pacing and scriptwriting here. The heavy, emotional weight of the Semana Santa procession is captured perfectly in image_882efe.jpg—carrying a two-ton statue for "12 STRAIGHT HOURS" [19:35] is a mind-blowing display of devotion. Blending that centuries-old tradition with the fact that Spain is also Europe's most feminist, progressive nation [03:17] is a masterclass in storytelling! 🇪🇸🎥
